testcase.name: test_ingestion_status_corpus_size

failure.message: AssertionError: Subprocess can't access Qdrant while Chainlit is running. Got total_points=0 assert 0 > 7000

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_omnilegal_v2.py:51: in test_ingestion_status_corpus_size assert data["total_points"] > 7000, ( E AssertionError: Subprocess can't access Qdrant while Chainlit is running. Got total_points=0 E assert 0 > 7000

testcase.name: test_debug_retrieve_indian_statutes

failure.message: AssertionError: STATUTES_IN retrieved 0 passages — Qdrant subprocess lock contention assert 0 >= 1

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_omnilegal_v2.py:72: in test_debug_retrieve_indian_statutes assert data["passage_count"] >= 1, ( E AssertionError: STATUTES_IN retrieved 0 passages — Qdrant subprocess lock contention E assert 0 >= 1

testcase.name: test_conflict_israel_us

failure.message: AssertionError: All per_jurisdiction entries had domestic_passages=0 — subprocess can't access the corpus while Chainlit holds Qdrant lock assert False

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_omnilegal_v2.py:95: in test_conflict_israel_us assert has_passages, ( E AssertionError: All per_jurisdiction entries had domestic_passages=0 — subprocess can't access the corpus while Chainlit holds Qdrant lock E assert False
